str:translations.str:about_feeds: This is a web feed, also known as an Atom feed. Subscribe by copying the URL from the address bar into your newsreader. Visit About Feeds to learn more and get started. It's free.

feed.title: ~/nbaig-dev - self-care
feed.subtitle: I am a backend web developer with 14+ years of experience. In this blog I will be posting my journey with the Rust Programming Language.

entry.title: Mind-Body Wellness Tips for Tech Workers
entry.summary: Explore 15 actionable tips for tech workers to enhance mind-body wellness. From sleep hygiene to mindful breathing, discover practical strategies for a healthier work-life balance in the fast-paced tech industry. Share these tips to inspire a well-rounded approach to professional well-being.

entry.title: Coping with Job Loss in the Tech Sector
entry.summary: Navigate job loss in the tech sector with resilience! Explore 15 strategies, from updating your resume to prioritizing self-care. Embrace new opportunities and rebuild your career path.

entry.title: Creating a Healthy Work-Life Integration in Tech
entry.summary: Unlock the secret to a balanced tech life! Explore 15 strategies for a healthy work-life integration, from setting boundaries to embracing flexibility. Elevate your well-being in the dynamic tech industry!
